enable-changelog-popup.name: Show Changelog at Startup
enable-changelog-popup.description: Show the <cj>Changelog</c> for new updates when starting up BetterEdit. Important updates that everyone should know about might override this behaviour, but if you disable this, you at least won't get changelogs for every single new Alpha version :) You can still always view the Changelog through the <cg>BetterEdit popup</c> in the <cj>Editor Pause Menu</c>

enable-auto-save.name: Enable Auto-Save
enable-auto-save.description: Automatically saves the level in the editor at the specified rate, as well as creates a backup. The backups created by autosave get automatically deleted after 3 new ones have been created to avoid using too much disk space

auto-save-rate.name: Auto-Save Rate (minutes)
auto-save-rate.description: How often the level should be auto-saved.

quick-save.name: Quick Save
quick-save.description: Makes level saving faster by saving to a backup file rather than directly to the save file

copy-paste-from-clipboard.name: Copy & Paste to Clipboard
copy-paste-from-clipboard.description: Copy & paste objects to/from system clipboard. This means that when you copy objects, you can paste it in a text editor in its text representation, and also paste it in to the editor later

enable-fixed-mouse-controls.name: Improved Mouse Controls
enable-fixed-mouse-controls.description: When enabled, you can scroll horizontally with Shift + Scroll Wheel & zoom with Control + Scroll Wheel

mouse-move-on-zoom.name: Zoom Towards Cursor
mouse-move-on-zoom.description: When enabled and while holding down the Control Key, zooming in the editor with the scroll wheel will be zoomed toward the cursor and not the center of the screen

pinch-to-zoom.name: Pinch to Zoom
pinch-to-zoom.description: When enabled, you can use two fingers to zoom

scale-rotate-input-modifier-keys.name: Enable Shift/Control on Scale Input
scale-rotate-input-modifier-keys.description: When holding the <cp>Shift</c> key, toggles snapping in the <co>Scale</c> and <cj>Rotate</c> controls, and when holding <cp>Control</c> toggles absolute position

scale-factor.name: Scale Factor
scale-factor.description: The factor the UI should be scaled by. <cr>Requires re-entering the editor!</c>

scale-pause.name: Scale Pause Menu
scale-pause.description: Whether the editor pause menu should be scaled according to the scale factor aswell

scale-build-tabs.name: Scale Build Tabs
scale-build-tabs.description: Whether the tabs above the object selection area should be scaled according to the scale factor aswell

hide-trigger-ui.name: Hide Trigger Backgrounds
hide-trigger-ui.description: Hides the <cc>backgrounds</c> on all triggers when using sliders, like with <cl>shader</c> triggers

show-zoom-text.name: Show Zoom Text
show-zoom-text.description: When enabled, flashes the current zoom level as text when you zoom in / out in the editor

grid-size-controls.name: Show Grid Size Controls
grid-size-controls.description: Shows controls in the UI for adjusting the size of the grid. <cr>Requires re-entering the editor!</c>

show-grid-on-size-change.name: Show Grid on Size Change
show-grid-on-size-change.description: If the grid is currently hidden and you use the controls to change its size, its toggled on

view-menu.name: Show View Tab
view-menu.description: Adds a new fourth tab to the editor with buttons from quickly toggling on/off the visibility of features

better-font-select.name: New Font Selection Menu
better-font-select.description: Replaces the old font select screen with a better one with scrolling

new-edit-menu.name: New Edit Menu
new-edit-menu.description: Changes the object moving menu to have the move button grouped directionally rather than in a list. <cr>Requires re-entering the editor!</c>

new-color-menu.name: New Color Menu
new-color-menu.description: Changes the object color selection menu to show more channels aswell as previews for colors and special colors

larger-color-menu.name: Larger Color Menu
larger-color-menu.description: If you're using the <cr>New Color Menu</c>, this makes the color channel buttons a bit larger

group-summary.name: Group Summary Button
group-summary.description: Show a button for opening <co>Group Summary</c> in the editor toolbar. You can alternatively set a keybind for opening <co>Group Summary</c>.
group-summary.enable-if-description: This feature is Supporter-only, but will be free soon!

trigger-indicator-section.name: Trigger Indicators
trigger-indicator-section.description: <cj>Trigger Indicators</c> draw lines between triggers and their target objects

trigger-indicators.name: Enable Trigger Indicators
trigger-indicators.description: Enables <cj>Trigger Indicators</c>, which draws lines between triggers and their target objects. This is the same as the vanilla "Trace In/Out" feature, except that implemented a little differently. This does not effect the Trace feature in any way

trigger-indicator-colors.name: Trigger Indicators: Dynamic Colors
trigger-indicator-colors.description: Control whether <cj>Trigger Indicators</c> should be colored based on the trigger, or if they should just be white

trigger-indicator-thickness.name: Trigger Indicators: Line Thickness
trigger-indicator-thickness.description: Control the width of the <cj>Trigger Indicators</c> lines

trigger-indicator-opacity.name: Trigger Indicators: Line Opacity
trigger-indicator-opacity.description: Control the opacity of the <cj>Trigger Indicators</c> lines

trigger-indicator-tickheads.name: Trigger Indicators: Arrow Heads
trigger-indicator-tickheads.description: If true, <cj>Trigger Indicators</c> have arrowheads at the end

keybind-rotate-45-ccw.name: Rotate 45 CCW
keybind-rotate-45-ccw.description: Rotate the Selected Object(s) 45 Degrees Counter-Clockwise

keybind-rotate-45-cw.name: Rotate 45 CW
keybind-rotate-45-cw.description: Rotate the Selected Object(s) 45 Degrees Clockwise

keybind-rotate-snap.name: Rotate Snap
keybind-rotate-snap.description: Rotate the Selected Object(s) to Match Adjacent Slopes

keybind-show-scale-xy.name: Toggle Scale X/Y Control
keybind-show-scale-xy.description: Toggle the object scaling by X/Y controls

keybind-pause-resume-playtest.name: Pause/Resume Playtest
keybind-pause-resume-playtest.description: Pauses or resumes the current playtest. Does not start playtesting

keybind-build-helper.name: Build Helper
keybind-build-helper.description: Executes the <cy>Build Helper</c> feature, aka remaps Group and Color IDs of the selected objects to unused ones

keybind-create-loop.name: Create loop
keybind-create-loop.description: Executes the <cy>Create Loop</c> feature, aka makes a Spawn Trigger loop

keybind-align-x.name: Align X
keybind-align-x.description: Executes the <cy>Align X</c> feature, aka aligns all of the selected objects along the X axis

keybind-align-y.name: Align Y
keybind-align-y.description: Executes the <cy>Align Y</c> feature, aka aligns all of the selected objects along the Y axis

keybind-open-edit-object.name: Edit Object
keybind-open-edit-object.description: Open the <cb>Edit Object</c> popup for the selected objects

keybind-open-edit-group.name: Edit Group
keybind-open-edit-group.description: Open the <co>Edit Group</c> popup for the selected objects

keybind-open-edit-special.name: Edit Special
keybind-open-edit-special.description: Open the <cj>Edit Special</c> popup for the selected objects

keybind-select-all-left.name: Select All Left
keybind-select-all-left.description: Select All Object(s) Left of the Screen

keybind-select-all-right.name: Select All Right
keybind-select-all-right.description: Select All Object(s) Right of the Screen

keybind-group-summary.name: Open Group Summary
keybind-group-summary.description: Opens up <co>Group Summary</c>, aka a list showing which groups are in use

keybind-move-obj-half-left.name: Move Object Half Left
keybind-move-obj-half-left.description: Move Selected Object(s) half of a Block left (15 Units)

keybind-move-obj-half-right.name: Move Object Half Right
keybind-move-obj-half-right.description: Move Selected Object(s) half of a Block right (15 Units)

keybind-move-obj-half-up.name: Move Object Half Up
keybind-move-obj-half-up.description: Move Selected Object(s) half of a Block up (15 Units)

keybind-move-obj-half-down.name: Move Object Half Down
keybind-move-obj-half-down.description: Move Selected Object(s) half of a Block down (15 Units)

keybind-move-obj-quarter-left.name: Move Object Quarter Left
keybind-move-obj-quarter-left.description: Move Selected Object(s) quarter of a Block left (7.5 Units)

keybind-move-obj-quarter-right.name: Move Object Quarter Right
keybind-move-obj-quarter-right.description: Move Selected Object(s) quarter of a Block right (7.5 Units)

keybind-move-obj-quarter-up.name: Move Object Quarter Up
keybind-move-obj-quarter-up.description: Move Selected Object(s) quarter of a Block up (7.5 Units)

keybind-move-obj-quarter-down.name: Move Object Quarter Down
keybind-move-obj-quarter-down.description: Move Selected Object(s) quarter of a Block down (7.5 Units)

keybind-move-obj-eighth-left.name: Move Object Eighth Left
keybind-move-obj-eighth-left.description: Move Selected Object(s) eighth of a Block left (3.75 Units)

keybind-move-obj-eighth-right.name: Move Object Eighth Right
keybind-move-obj-eighth-right.description: Move Selected Object(s) eighth of a Block right (3.75 Units)

keybind-move-obj-eighth-up.name: Move Object Eighth Up
keybind-move-obj-eighth-up.description: Move Selected Object(s) eighth of a Block up (3.75 Units)

keybind-move-obj-eighth-down.name: Move Object Eighth Down
keybind-move-obj-eighth-down.description: Move Selected Object(s) eighth of a Block down (3.75 Units)

keybind-move-obj-big-left.name: Move Object Big Left
keybind-move-obj-big-left.description: Move Selected Object(s) 5 Blocks left (150 Units)

keybind-move-obj-big-right.name: Move Object Big Right
keybind-move-obj-big-right.description: Move Selected Object(s) 5 Blocks right (150 Units)

keybind-move-obj-big-up.name: Move Object Big Up
keybind-move-obj-big-up.description: Move Selected Object(s) 5 Blocks up (150 Units)

keybind-move-obj-big-down.name: Move Object Big Down
keybind-move-obj-big-down.description: Move Selected Object(s) 5 Blocks down (150 Units)

wip-section.name: WIP Features
wip-section.description: These settings are for features that are currently Work-In-Progress. This means that <cr>these features may be unstable and unusable</c>, and are only included for testing purposes. <ca>Developer Mode</c> is required to enable them.
